108000.name: 花果山火星齊天豪宅

contract.role: Mars seat ownership — 500 seats, notifyReward from Brain
contract.status_note: Repo source does not embed a deployed address and KGEN/README.md does not list MarsSeats; Portal and 108000 frontend display 0x3529dbFbaD465C2269F8096879A1c298d5257298 as deployed/formal.

verified_from: KGEN/contracts/KGEN_MarsSeats_V2_2_1.sol inline banner and contract declaration
Solidity source declares MAX_SEATS = 500, default seatPriceWhole = 5000, constructor(address token), setBrain(address), notifyReward(uint256), claimSeat(uint256), claimSeats(uint256[])
notifyReward is ONLY_BRAIN and includes REWARD_NOT_FUNDED solvency guard
KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0.sol declares marsBps default 2500, bounds nonzero marsBps to 2000-3000, and rollPayroll transfer-then-notify wiring

active_gaps.note: Portal/frontend show MarsSeats deployed address; KGEN/README.md authoritative chain section only lists KGEN token, LP pair, PinkLock, and Genesis Inscription.
108000 frontend ABI labels differ from repo source function names/types; confirm deployed ABI before runtime edits. No external chain/RPC bytecode verification was performed in this indexing pass.
Portal node map shows MarsSeats but has no href to K線西遊記/temples/108000/index.html.

KGEN/README.md role, version, deployed address, LP pair

summary.name: KLINE GENESIS
summary.tax_model: 0.30% AMM-only tax: 0.10% burn, 0.10% bankWallet, 0.05% rewardWallet, 0.05% autoLPWallet
summary.no_tax_rule: Wallet-to-wallet transfers are no-tax unless a registered AMM pair participates; tax-exempt addresses are no-tax.

open_gaps: Live bankWallet/rewardWallet/autoLPWallet addresses are not documented in repo docs scanned for Phase 1.
LP pair address is documented, but repo docs scanned here do not prove live setMarketMakerPair registration.
No external chain/RPC bytecode verification was performed in this indexing pass.

summary.runtime_model: Receives KGEN rewardWallet tax flow, manages margin staking, rolls payroll, supplies Heart 12345, and notifies MarsSeats 108000.

open_gaps: KGEN/README.md has no Brain 11520 deployment entry found in this pass.
Portal/temple UI display Brain as deployed, but no external chain/RPC bytecode verification was performed.
Live post-deploy setMarsSeats, setPublicGoodTreasury, setKeeper, lockConfig, and Token rewardWallet values are not documented in repo docs scanned for Phase 1.

routing_refs.via: 0.1% tax receiver endpoint per existing index notes

treasury_contract_detail.caution: Treasury is overloaded across 8888, 18888, Galactic Bank, Brain treasury/publicGoodTreasury, and MarsSeats treasury fields. Keep each address/config separate.

infrastructure_contracts.role: Tax splitter — 10% AutoLP + 90% to 9 demon addresses

active_conflicts.repo_status: KGEN_GalacticBank_V7_5_2 and KGEN_LingxiaoDeityBank_V1_0_1 are source-only by authoritative KGEN/README.md address list
active_conflicts.portal_reference: 0xfc522243e988a837700CaD600D6f030f5932681F displayed as 18888 Bank / Galactic Bank in Portal and archive references

active_conflicts.repo_status: SOURCE_WITH_FRONTEND_DEPLOYED_REF in contract index because KGEN/README.md does not document a MarsSeats deployment but Portal/frontend show a formal address

active_conflicts.summary: Frontend ABI includes totalSeats/maxSeats/seatPrice/seatsOf(address as array)/pendingSeat(address), while repo source exposes MAX_SEATS/seatPriceWei/seatsOf(address count)/pendingSeat(uint256). Do not infer deployed bytecode identity from filename or UI label alone.
Portal and temple UI show Brain as deployed, but KGEN/README.md has no Brain deployment entry found in this pass. Do not infer README-verified deployment status from filename or portal label alone.
